description: Covert consistency check pairs embedded across modules. These verify response validity without alerting the respondent to the presence of attention checks.

consistency_checks.description: Formality self-assessment (M03-Q06) should converge with audience formality calibration (M07-Q02). Both measure the respondent's formality orientation from different angles.
Emotional expressiveness preference (M04-Q09) should be semantically consistent with contextual emotional adaptation (M11-Q01). Both probe the respondent's comfort with emotional content in writing.

Risk tolerance in voice experimentation (M02-Q10) should positively correlate with preference for Germanic/Anglo-Saxon precision vocabulary (M09-Q09). Writers who take creative risks tend to favor direct, concrete word choices.

notes.covert_design: These checks are embedded within their respective modules and are indistinguishable from regular questions to the respondent.
notes.timing: Check pairs are separated by multiple modules to prevent proximity-based consistency gaming.
notes.severity_levels: warning = reduce dimension confidence score; informational = log but do not penalize
